_notes: AEL Component Library. Each entry defines pins and optional vcc_range [min, max] in volts. Pin types: PASSIVE, INPUT, OUTPUT, IO, POWER_IN, GROUND.

LED.label: LED
LED.description: Light Emitting Diode. Always use a current-limiting resistor in series.

RES.label: Resistor
RES.description: Generic resistor. Use value= attribute e.g. value=220R, value=10K.

CAP.label: Capacitor
CAP.description: Generic capacitor. Use value= attribute e.g. value=100nF, value=10uF.

BUTTON.label: Pushbutton
BUTTON.description: Momentary pushbutton switch. Use a pull-up or pull-down resistor to avoid floating input.

BUZZER.label: Buzzer
BUZZER.description: Passive or active buzzer. Passive requires PWM signal; active requires DC.

NPN.label: NPN Transistor
NPN.description: NPN BJT transistor e.g. 2N2222, BC547. Base driven by GPIO via resistor.

MOSFET.label: N-Channel MOSFET
MOSFET.description: N-channel MOSFET e.g. IRLZ44N. Gate driven by GPIO.

DIODE.label: Rectifier Diode
DIODE.description: General purpose diode e.g. 1N4007. Used for flyback protection, reverse polarity.

ZENER.label: Zener Diode
ZENER.description: Zener diode for voltage clamping/regulation. Use value= for breakdown voltage e.g. value=3.3V.

BATT.label: Battery
BATT.description: Battery or battery pack. Use value= for voltage e.g. value=9V, value=3.7V.

REG.label: Voltage Regulator
REG.description: Linear voltage regulator e.g. AMS1117-3.3, LM7805. Use value= for output voltage e.g. value=3.3V.

OLED_I2C.label: I2C OLED Display
OLED_I2C.description: 128x64 or 128x32 I2C OLED display. Typically SSD1306. 3.3V only.

LCD_I2C.label: I2C LCD Display
LCD_I2C.description: 16x2 or 20x4 LCD with I2C backpack (PCF8574). Typically 5V but many modules accept 3.3V.

DHT22.label: DHT22 Temp/Humidity Sensor
DHT22.description: AM2302 digital temp and humidity sensor. Single-wire data. Needs 10K pull-up on DATA.

DHT11.label: DHT11 Temp/Humidity Sensor
DHT11.description: Basic digital temp and humidity sensor. Lower accuracy than DHT22. Needs 10K pull-up on DATA.

DS18B20.label: DS18B20 Temperature Sensor
DS18B20.description: 1-Wire digital temperature sensor. Needs 4.7K pull-up on DATA to VCC.

PIR.label: PIR Motion Sensor
PIR.description: Passive infrared motion sensor e.g. HC-SR501. Output goes HIGH on motion detection.

LDR.label: Light Dependent Resistor
LDR.description: Photoresistor. Resistance decreases with light. Use in a voltage divider with a fixed resistor.

SOIL.label: Soil Moisture Sensor
SOIL.description: Capacitive or resistive soil moisture sensor. AOUT is analog, DOUT is digital threshold.

NEOPIXEL.label: NeoPixel / WS2812B
NEOPIXEL.description: Addressable RGB LED strip or ring. DIN is data in, DOUT chains to next pixel. Use a 300-500R resistor on DIN.

SERVO.label: Servo Motor
SERVO.description: RC servo motor. SIG is PWM control signal (50Hz). Most servos are 5V — do not power from ESP 3V3 pin directly.

RELAY.label: Relay Module
RELAY.description: Single or multi-channel relay module. IN is active-LOW control from GPIO. Use flyback diode on coil.

POTENTIOMETER.label: Potentiometer
POTENTIOMETER.description: Variable resistor with wiper. VCC and GND on outer pins, WIPER (analog out) on centre.

ENCODER.label: Rotary Encoder
ENCODER.description: Incremental rotary encoder with optional push button. CLK and DT are quadrature outputs.

ULTRASONIC.label: Ultrasonic Distance Sensor
ULTRASONIC.description: HC-SR04 or similar. TRIG is triggered by GPIO pulse, ECHO returns distance pulse. Note: ECHO is 5V — use voltage divider with 3.3V MCUs.

MAX7219.label: MAX7219 LED Matrix Driver
MAX7219.description: SPI LED matrix or 7-segment display driver. Daisy-chainable.

MPU6050.label: MPU-6050 IMU
MPU6050.description: 6-axis accelerometer and gyroscope over I2C. 3.3V only on most breakout boards.

BMP280.label: BMP280 Pressure/Temp Sensor
BMP280.description: Barometric pressure and temperature sensor over I2C or SPI.

SSD1306.label: SSD1306 OLED (SPI)
SSD1306.description: SPI variant of the SSD1306 OLED display driver.
